{{Quote|Perhaps if yousa helped us pounden those bursas, wesa could help yousa against Rogoe.|Copek asks Boss Gallo to remove the bursa threat to their city|<ref name="SW:GB" />}}
'''Copek''' was an [[Ankura/Legends|Ankura]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] and the [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Otoh Urs]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3000 BBY]]. During a [[War of the Gungan tribes|war]] between the Gungan tribes around that [[Time/Legends|time]], Otoh Urs regularly suffered attacks from native predatory [[Bursa/Legends|bursa]] creatures. The city was eventually visited by [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo]], another Boss who was uniting the Gungans against [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe]], the instigator of the war. Copek said they would join Gallo's cause if he removed the bursa threat, which Gallo was able to do. Copek then contributed four [[Gungan catapult/Legends|energy catapults]] to Gallo's [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Grand Army]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Yousa think yousa town was the only one to face those beasts? Wesa must reserve oursa soldiers to fighten the bursa raids.|Copek explains their city's troubles to Gallo|<ref name="SW:GB" />}}
[[File:Otoh_Urs.jpg|thumb|left|270px|Copek in Otoh Urs]]
Copek was a [[Ankura/Legends|Ankura]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] with [[Color/Legends|green]] skin who was the [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Otoh Urs]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in [[3000 BBY]].<ref name="EA" /> While they served as Otoh Urs's Boss, the Gungan tribes became engaged in heavy [[War of the Gungan tribes|warfare]] with each other, and at the same [[Time/Legends|time]], the city faced constant attacks from [[Bursa/Legends|bursas]], a carnivorous and [[Sentience/Legends|semi-sentient]] predator [[Species/Legends|species]] on Naboo. Due to the attacks, Copek was forced to keep training Gungans to defend Otoh Urs from the bursas, but they were unable to completely remove the threat.<ref name="SW:GB" />

Eventually, Copek was visited by [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo]], the former Boss of the city of [[Otoh Sancture]], who was trying to unite the Gungans against [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe]], the Gungan [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] who had instigated the war. Copek told Gallo that they were sympathetic to his cause, as Gallo's city had been destroyed by bursas, but said that they would only join Gallo if he agreed to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the bursas attacking their city. Gallo led his [[Militiagung/Legends|militiagungs]] to destroy the bursas, and the Gungans returned to Otoh Urs carrying their pelts. Glad to finally be rid of the bursas, Copek contributed four [[Gungan catapult/Legends|energy catapults]] to Gallo's [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Grand Army]].<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Boss Gallo, mesa have heard of yousa suffering and mesa sympatize.|Copek, to Gallo|<ref name="SW:GB" />}}
During the war between the Gungan tribes, Copek was forced to keep training militiagungs to fight the bursas assaulting their city, but they were unable to find a permanent way to end the threat, which caused him to ask Boss Gallo for assistance. Copek was also sympathetic to Gallo, as both of their cities had been attacked by bursas, with Gallo's being destroyed.<ref name="SW:GB" /> Copek was also a Gungan surname for a violent predator found in the waterways in Naboo's core.<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The boss of Otoh Urs was first mentioned in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' by [[Steven L. Kent]],<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> released on [[November 7]], [[2001]].<ref name="PrimaDate">{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Galactic-Battlegrounds-Official/dp/0761537503|text=Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide}}</ref> They appeared and was identified as Copek in the second level of the Gungan campaign, "The Gungan Who Would Be Boss," in the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'',<ref name="SW:GB" /> released on [[November 11]], 2001.<ref name="GBDate">{{GameSpot|url=games/star-wars-galactic-battlegrounds|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds}}</ref> The guide stated that only their voice would be heard,<ref name="Prima" /> but in the game Copek is physically seen in Otoh Urs. The image that represents Copek in the game is the same used for several other Gungan bosses who appear, and their voice actor is uncredited in the game.<ref name="SW:GB" />
